seo.title: How we work — logic mapping, build, go-live
seo.description: Bekur's delivery model: business logic first, one workflow per sprint, partner approvals, fixed price, and hard AI caps. No open-ended discovery.

hero.headline: Logic before code. Accountability by design.
hero.subheadline: We don't sell features or digital transformation. We ship one production workflow your team will use — mapped to how you already operate.

phases.title: Logic Mapping
phases.description: Map triggers, data sources, approvals, and exceptions. Challenge broken logic before implementation.

phases.title: Fixed-scope build
phases.description: Senior-only team builds into your stack. AI architecture includes spend caps and monitoring.

phases.title: Approval & go-live
phases.description: Partner sign-off on client-facing steps. Documentation, walkthroughs, adoption support.

approvalGates: Every client-facing automated step requires partner-defined approval rules
Scope changes only via written change order
AI spend cap agreed before build begins
changeOrderPolicy: One workflow per sprint. Additional workflows or material scope expansion require a new sprint or signed change order — never silent scope creep.
